name: Burgan
declaringWar: Your defiance has exhausted our patience. The legions of Burgan march. Prepare for annihilation.
attacked: You dare challenge us? Then let the world witness the price of your arrogance.
defeated: It is over. Perhaps now I shall have peace, at last.
introduction: I am Chrees Hoddenban, sovereign of Burgan. Our banners have crossed deserts and mountains alike. See that you give them the respect they deserve.
tradeRequest: Would you be interested in a trade agreement?

name: Rodgradia
declaringWar: We seek no quarrel, but your arrogance leaves us no alternative.
attacked: Very well, this shall not be forgotten.
defeated: You have bested us today. We concede, but not in despair.
introduction: I am Marfa Filippova of Rodgradia. May our nations find friendship or, failing that, clarity in conflict.
tradeRequest: Here, deal with me.

name: Netolania
declaringWar: Your actions leave us no choice but to respond with force. War is inevitable.
attacked: Your treachery is noted. We shall remember this.
defeated: Though we fall, our spirit remains unbroken. History will remember Netolania.
introduction: Well met. I am Bohunka. Let us see if our interests align.
tradeRequest: Would you be interested in a trade agreement?

name: Busanya
declaringWar: After careful analysis, we have concluded that conflict is the only remaining variable. War is now inevitable.
attacked: An unfortunate decision. Underestimating us has rarely yielded favorable results.
defeated: You may claim victory over our nation, but ideas cannot be conquered so easily.
introduction: I welcome you in the name of Busanya. Through observation, inquiry, and innovation, we seek to illuminate the unknown.
tradeRequest: An exchange of resources benefits all rational participants. Shall we proceed?

name: Mertangale
declaringWar: After careful analysis, we have concluded that conflict is the only remaining variable. War is now inevitable.
attacked: An unfortunate decision. Underestimating us has rarely yielded favorable results.
defeated: You may claim victory over our nation, but ideas cannot be conquered so easily.
introduction: I welcome you in the name of Busanya. Through observation, inquiry, and innovation, we seek to illuminate the unknown.

name: Gethousia
declaringWar: You're disturbing us, prepare for war.
attacked: You've fallen into my trap. I'll bury you.
defeated: I congratulate you for your victory.
introduction: Welcome. I'm Carmen, of Gethousia; the smartest military man in world history.
tradeRequest: Gethousia offers you this exceptional proposition.

name: Fosnauce
declaringWar: It's a kill or be killed world, mate. I will make this quick.
attacked: Haah... Your armies will be totally destroyed before they ever set foot in Fosnauce!
defeated: I congratulate you for your victory.
introduction: Ah, How I love introductions! I am the great king Jack Johnson. I lead my great people, and the nation of Fosnauce.
tradeRequest: Fosnauce offers you this exceptional proposition.

name: Kogi
declaringWar: You leave us no choice. War it must be.
attacked: Very well, this shall not be forgotten.
defeated: It is over. Perhaps now I shall have peace, at last.
introduction: We are pleased to meet you. I am Alphonso Alger of Kogi.
tradeRequest: Would you be interested in a trade agreement?

name: Hyeonsang
declaringWar: You're disturbing us, prepare for war.
attacked: You've fallen into my trap. I'll bury you.
defeated: I congratulate you for your victory.
introduction: Welcome. I'm Jung-hee, of Hyeonsang; the smartest military woman in world history.
tradeRequest: Hyeonsang offers you this exceptional proposition.

name: Qadira
declaringWar: The drums of war echo across the land. By my command, your nation shall be brought to heel.
attacked: So be it. We shall answer your war with overwhelming force.
defeated: You have won this day. See that you possess the strength to preserve what you have claimed.
introduction: Many nations have risen. Many have fallen. Qadira endures because weakness has never found refuge within our borders.
tradeRequest: Qadira offers you this exceptional proposition.

name: Cuauhtlan
declaringWar: Let's go to war! There will be no peace until you surrender.
attacked: Foolishness. Absolute foolishness!
defeated: I congratulate you for your victory.
introduction: Welcome to our nation. I am Ehecatl, leader of the mighty Cuauhtlan.
tradeRequest: Cuauhtlan offers you this exceptional proposition.

name: Ulfrik
declaringWar: To victory! To Odin's halls!
attacked: You suppose you are to control the fire you have started. No, ho ho ho... No! It is too great for you!
defeated: So, I will join the einherjar in Valhalla and feast, while you toil away here.
introduction: Vitali Krupina stands before you: a Viking unlike any the seas and lands have ever known. Hah, are you afraid?
tradeRequest: This is a fine deal! Even a drunk beggar would agree!

name: Bulebua
declaringWar: You leave us no choice. War it must be.
attacked: Very well, this shall not be forgotten.
defeated: It is over. Perhaps now I shall have peace, at last.
introduction: We are pleased to meet you. I am Paul Abdullahi of Bulebua.
tradeRequest: Would you be interested in a trade agreement?

name: Hoshigawa
declaringWar: I will not allow the Empire to suffer you any longer. The time has come to end this charade!
attacked: The Divine Wind will protect us and you will fall, like the others.
defeated: Please end this dishonor to my family... to my people.
introduction: Hello, I am Takuma Hoshino of Hoshigawa, a humble disciple of Bushido.
tradeRequest: What do you offer in return for the favor of the Empire of Hoshigawa?
